2026-05-19

A real time lighting technique for procedurally generated 2d isometric game terrains

用于程序生成的二维等距游戏地形的实时光照技术

\'Erick Oliveira Rodrigues、Esteban Clua

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.17666v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This work proposes an automatic real time lighting technique for procedurally generated isometric maps. The scenario is generated from a string seed and the proposed lighting system estimates the geometrical shape of the 2D objects as if they were 3D for further light interaction, therefore producing a 2.5D effect. We employ opacity maps to overcome an issue generated by the geometrical shape estimation. The solution is a coupled approach between the CPU and GPU. The produced visuals, gameplay and performance were evaluated by gamers, programmers and designers. Furthermore, the performance, in terms of frames per second, was evaluated over distinct graphics cards and processors and was satisfactory.

arXiv:2605.17666v1 公告类型：新 摘要：这项工作提出了一种用于程序生成等距地图的自动实时照明技术。该场景是由字符串种子生成的，所提出的照明系统会估计 2D 对象的几何形状，就好像它们是 3D 对象一样，以进行进一步的光交互，从而产生 2.5D 效果。我们使用不透明度贴图来克服几何形状估计产生的问题。解决方案是 CPU 和 GPU 之间的耦合方法。游戏玩家、程序员和设计师对制作的视觉效果、游戏玩法和性能进行了评估。此外，通过不同的显卡和处理器对每秒帧数的性能进行了评估，结果令人满意。

其他
2026-05-19

CelloCut: Constructive Watertight Remeshing via Tetrahedral Cell Cuts

CelloCut：通过四面体单元切割进行建设性水密重新网格化

Xuan Yang、Yuhang Zeng、Dinglong Fang、Guochuan Tang、Jiaju Jiang 等

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.17853v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Watertight remeshing aims to recover a surface that induces a globally consistent interior--exterior partition of 3D space. However, for meshes with complex topology, single-layer structures, or large missing regions, inferring such a partition from local surface geometry is inherently ambiguous. As a result, existing methods often produce surface-accurate yet volumetrically inconsistent reconstructions, e.g., closely spaced double shells. The key insight of this work is that watertight remeshing should be treated as a volumetric partitioning problem rather than a surface-level repair task. To this end, we propose CelloCut, a constructive framework that formulates watertight conversion as a binary labeling problem over a Delaunay tetrahedral partition of space. We solve this via graph-cut energy minimization with one-sided constraints that preserve proxy-supported interior evidence and weighted interface penalties that discourage unsupported newly introduced boundaries. By computing a globally consistent volumetric partition, CelloCut guarantees a strictly watertight output by construction and strongly suppresses pseudo-watertight artifacts such as double shells, even under severe topological defects. Experimental results on two newly introduced challenging benchmarks, CelloScan and CelloFill, as well as standard ModelNet10 dataset, demonstrate that CelloCut significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in handling complex topologies and single-layer structures, producing compact and volumetrically consistent solid reconstructions. The project page is available at https://rangeryx-66.github.io/CelloCut/.

arXiv:2605.17853v1 公告类型：新 摘要：水密重新网格化旨在恢复一个表面，从而产生 3D 空间的全局一致的内部-外部分区。然而，对于具有复杂拓扑、单层结构或大缺失区域的网格，从局部表面几何形状推断这种划分本质上是不明确的。因此，现有方法通常会产生表面精确但体积不一致的重建，例如紧密间隔的双壳。这项工作的关键见解是，水密重新网格划分应被视为体积分区问题，而不是表面级修复任务。为此，我们提出了 CelloCut，这是一个构造性框架，它将无懈可击的转换制定为 Delaunay 四面体空间划分上的二元标记问题。我们通过图割能量最小化和单方面约束来解决这个问题，这些约束保留了代理支持的内部证据和加权接口惩罚，以阻止不受支持的新引入的边界。通过计算全局一致的体积分区，CelloCut 通过构造保证严格的水密输出，并强烈抑制伪水密伪像，例如双壳，即使在严重的拓扑缺陷下也是如此。两个新引入的具有挑战性的基准（CelloScan 和 CelloFill）以及标准 ModelNet10 数据集的实验结果表明，CelloCut 显着优于最先进的方法，特别是在处理复杂拓扑和单层结构、生成紧凑且体积一致的实体重建方面。该项目页面位于 https://rangeryx-66.github.io/CelloCut/。

目标检测/分割3D视觉
2026-05-19

Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting using Tensor Cores

使用 Tensor Core 加速 3D 高斯泼溅

Sheng Li、Yang Sui、Yue Wu、Zhuoran Song、Bo Yuan 等

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.17855v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become a leading technique for real-time neural rendering and 3D scene reconstruction, but its rendering cost remains too high for many latency-sensitive scenarios. In particular, the rasterization stage in 3DGS dominates end-to-end rendering time, during which the renderer repeatedly evaluates each Gaussian's contribution to each covered pixel, making this stage compute-bound. At the same time, modern GPUs provide high-throughput Tensor Cores for low-precision matrix operations, yet existing 3DGS systems execute rasterization entirely on CUDA cores and leave Tensor Cores idle. We find that 3DGS rendering can be executed in FP16 with negligible quality degradation, suggesting a promising opportunity for Tensor Core acceleration. However, exploiting Tensor Cores for 3DGS is non-trivial because rasterization does not naturally match their execution model. Existing 3DGS rasterization is expressed as irregular per-pixel scalar operations, whereas Tensor Cores require dense, regular, and reuse-rich matrix workloads. Moreover, conventional tile-by-tile execution fails to exploit Gaussian reuse across neighboring tiles, resulting in repeated data loading and thus high data movement overhead. To this end, we present TensorGS, a 3DGS acceleration framework using Tensor Cores. TensorGS tensorizes the dominant rasterization computation into Tensor-Core-compatible matrix operations and introduces cross-tile grouping to improve Gaussian reuse, amortize overhead, and increase Tensor Core utilization. Experimental results show that TensorGS improves end-to-end rendering performance by 1.65$\times$ while preserving image quality.

arXiv:2605.17855v1 公告类型：新 摘要：3D 高斯分布 (3DGS) 已成为实时神经渲染和 3D 场景重建的领先技术，但对于许多延迟敏感的场景来说，其渲染成本仍然过高。特别是，3DGS 中的光栅化阶段主导着端到端渲染时间，在此期间渲染器重复评估每个高斯对每个覆盖像素的贡献，从而使该阶段受到计算限制。与此同时，现代 GPU 为低精度矩阵运算提供高吞吐量 Tensor Core，但现有 3DGS 系统完全在 CUDA 核心上执行光栅化，并使 Tensor Core 闲置。我们发现 3DGS 渲染可以在 FP16 中执行，质量下降可以忽略不计，这表明 Tensor Core 加速有很大的机会。然而，利用 Tensor Core 进行 3DGS 并非易事，因为光栅化并不自然地匹配其执行模型。现有的 3DGS 光栅化表示为不规则的每像素标量操作，而 Tensor Core 需要密集、规则且可重用的矩阵工作负载。此外，传统的逐块执行无法利用相邻块之间的高斯重用，导致重复的数据加载，从而导致高数据移动开销。为此，我们推出了 TensorGS，这是一个使用 Tensor Core 的 3DGS 加速框架。 TensorGS 将主要的光栅化计算张量化为 Tensor-Core 兼容的矩阵运算，并引入跨切片分组来提高高斯重用、分摊开销并提高 Tensor Core 利用率。实验结果表明，TensorGS 在保持图像质量的同时，将端到端渲染性能提高了 1.65$\times$。

目标检测/分割
2026-05-19

Tangent Blow-Ups for Processing Non-Manifold Geometry

用于处理非流形几何体的切线放大

Alice Petrov、Mohammad Sina Nabizadeh、Ana Dodik、Justin Solomon

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.18215v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many geometry processing pipelines implicitly assume their input data is a manifold, or is sampled from one, with a unique tangent plane at every point. Geometric data, however, routinely contains sharp features like edges, corners, self-intersections, branching junctions, and other singularities, rendering standard methods ill-defined at these points. To bring geometry processing to these and other singular spaces, we introduce the ``tangent blow-up,'' a representation inspired by algebraic geometry that restores structure at singularities by lifting to the product of the ambient space and the Grassmannian of tangent planes. After iterating this construction, points that coincide in position but differ in tangent direction, curvature, or higher-order contact become well-separated. We equip the tangent blow-up with a product metric and define discretized differential operators, such as the gradient, divergence, and Laplacian, directly in the lifted domain. We demonstrate our framework across geodesic computation, segmentation, surface parameterization, and curvature estimation.

arXiv:2605.18215v1 公告类型：新摘要：许多几何处理管道隐式地假设其输入数据是流形，或者是从流形中采样的，每个点都有唯一的切平面。然而，几何数据通常包含尖锐的特征，如边缘、角、自相交、分支连接点和其他奇点，使得标准方法在这些点上定义不明确。为了将几何处理引入这些和其他奇异空间，我们引入了“切线爆炸”，这是一种受代数几何启发的表示，通过提升到环境空间和切平面的格拉斯曼的乘积来恢复奇点处的结构。迭代此构造后，位置重合但切线方向、曲率或高阶接触不同的点变得很好分离。我们为切线爆炸配备了乘积度量，并直接在提升域中定义离散微分算子，例如梯度、散度和拉普拉斯算子。我们展示了我们的测地线计算、分割、表面参数化和曲率估计框架。

多模态/VLM
2026-05-19

ANVIL: Analogies and Videos for Lecturers

ANVIL：为讲师提供的类比和视频

Yuri Noviello、Anastasiia Birillo、Gosia Migut

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.16295v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present ANVIL, a multimodal generative system that automates the production of analogy-based instructional animations for computer science topics. Given a concept definition, ANVIL generates a textual analogy, compiles it into a structured visual screenplay, and produces executable manim code to render an animation, with an automated repair mechanism to improve robustness. Evaluating such systems at scale requires balancing pedagogical validity with scalability. We begin with a teacher evaluation to ground the quality assessment and use its findings to guide automated screening. For textual analogies, we introduce an LLM-based evaluator for scalable quality screening; for videos, where subjective judgments are difficult to automate, we instead assess fidelity to the intended screenplay using an automated proxy for auditing and error analysis. We further conduct a user study with educators to examine adoption requirements and risks. Our findings suggest that ANVIL can produce materials that are frequently rated as adequate, and that educators respond positively to its perceived value and usability.

arXiv:2605.16295v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：我们提出了 ANVIL，一种多模式生成系统，可以自动生成计算机科学主题的基于类比的教学动画。给定概念定义，ANVIL 生成文本类比，将其编译成结构化视觉剧本，并生成可执行 manim 代码来渲染动画，并使用自动修复机制来提高鲁棒性。大规模评估此类系统需要平衡教学有效性和可扩展性。我们从教师评估开始，为质量评估奠定基础，并利用其结果来指导自动筛选。对于文本类比，我们引入了基于 LLM 的评估器，用于可扩展的质量筛选；对于视频，主观判断很难自动化，我们而是使用自动代理进行审核和错误分析来评估对预期剧本的保真度。我们进一步与教育工作者进行用户研究，以检查采用要求和风险。我们的研究结果表明，ANVIL 可以制作经常被评为足够的材料，并且教育工作者对其感知价值和可用性做出积极反应。

其他
2026-05-19

TARIPlay: A Test Framework for AR Applications based on Interactive Area Tracking in Playback Videos

TARIPlay：基于回放视频中交互区域跟踪的 AR 应用测试框架

Seyed Amir Mousavi、Xiaoyin Wang

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.16544v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As Augmented Reality (AR) becomes more and more embedded in daily life, ensuring the quality, safety, and reliability of AR applications is increasingly important. However, AR apps present unique challenges for automated testing. Unlike static GUI layouts in traditional mobile apps, AR apps acquire their interaction interface from the surrounding environment, which is volatile and non-deterministic. Recent advancements like ARCore Playback and ARKit Replay allow developers to reuse real-world scenarios by recording and playing back enriched videos, enabling more feasible automated AR testing. However, using playback videos introduces two major challenges: test inputs must be timed precisely, and interactive areas in the video are dynamic, irregular, and difficult to identify. To address these challenges, we propose TARIPlay, a framework that analyzes playback videos to detect, track, and filter proper interactive areas over time for automated testing. In particular, TARIPlay identifies viable test opportunities based on criteria like stability and visibility, then feeds this information to an automated testing engine to simulate user interactions. We perform an experiment with four open-source AR apps and nine playback videos. Evaluation results show that TARIPlay significantly outperforms the existing tool Monkey in test coverage (55.8% over 41.98% on branch coverage) of AR-related code, and can also be used to assess the quality of playback videos for testing suitability.

arXiv:2605.16544v1 发布类型：cross 摘要：随着增强现实（AR）越来越深入日常生活，确保 AR 应用的质量、安全性和可靠性变得越来越重要。然而，AR 应用程序给自动化测试带来了独特的挑战。与传统移动应用程序中的静态 GUI 布局不同，AR 应用程序从周围环境中获取交互界面，这是不稳定且不确定的。 ARCore Playback 和 ARKit Replay 等最新进展使开发人员能够通过录制和回放丰富的视频来重用现实场景，从而实现更可行的自动化 AR 测试。然而，使用回放视频带来了两个主要挑战：测试输入必须精确计时，并且视频中的交互区域是动态的、不规则的且难以识别。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 TARIPlay，这是一个分析播放视频的框架，可以随着时间的推移检测、跟踪和过滤适当的交互区域，以进行自动化测试。特别是，TARIPlay 根据稳定性和可见性等标准识别可行的测试机会，然后将此信息提供给自动化测试引擎以模拟用户交互。我们使用四个开源 AR 应用程序和九个播放视频进行了实验。评测结果显示，TARIPlay在AR相关代码的测试覆盖率（分支覆盖率55.8%，分支覆盖率41.98%）方面明显优于现有工具Monkey，并且还可以用于评估播放视频的质量以测试适用性。

2026-05-19

Beyond One-Size-Fits-All: User Strategies for Simplification Technique and Level Selection in Responsive Line Charts

超越一刀切：响应式折线图中简化技术和级别选择的用户策略

Rifat Ara Proma、Paul Rosen

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.16661v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Simplifying line charts for responsive displays typically applies a single algorithm uniformly across devices, despite the availability of multiple techniques that preserve different signal characteristics (e.g., peaks, trends, periodicity). We investigate whether users benefit from algorithmic choice when adapting charts across screen sizes. In a within-subjects study (N=30), participants simplified nine datasets under three conditions: single pre-assigned technique (C1), multiple techniques (C2), and multiple techniques with manual point selection (C3), each with control over simplification level. We found that users adapted technique selections across datasets rather than devices, leveraging dataset-level strategies rather than per-device optimization. Additionally, interaction complexity did not always increase engagement uniformly, suggesting that responsive simplification tools should balance algorithmic flexibility with progressive disclosure and strong defaults. Supplemental materials are available at https://osf.io/yjp76/?view_only=b77b5e97f0cc4f689fbf48ad0d965af3.

arXiv:2605.16661v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：简化响应式显示的折线图通常跨设备统一应用单一算法，尽管有多种技术可以保留不同的信号特征（例如峰值、趋势、周期性）。我们调查用户在跨屏幕尺寸调整图表时是否受益于算法选择。在一项受试者内研究 (N=30) 中，参与者在三种条件下简化了 9 个数据集：单一预分配技术 (C1)、多种技术 (C2) 和手动点选择的多种技术 (C3)，每种技术都可以控制简化级别。我们发现用户跨数据集而不是设备调整技术选择，利用数据集级策略而不是每设备优化。此外，交互复杂性并不总是均匀地增加参与度，这表明响应式简化工具应该在算法灵活性与渐进式披露和强默认值之间取得平衡。补充材料可在 https://osf.io/yjp76/?view_only=b77b5e97f0cc4f689fbf48ad0d965af3 获取。

目标检测/分割多模态/VLM生成模型/扩散
2026-05-19

QQJ: Quantifying Qualitative Judgment for Scalable and Human-Aligned Evaluation of Generative AI

QQJ：量化生成人工智能的可扩展和人性化评估的定性判断

Marjan Veysi、Pirooz Shamsinejadbabaki、Mohammad Zare、Mohammad Sabouri

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.17382v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid progress of generative artificial intelligence has exposed fundamental limitations in existing evaluation methodologies, particularly for open-ended, creative, and human-facing tasks. Traditional automatic metrics rely on surface-level statistical similarity and often fail to reflect human perceptions of quality, while purely human evaluation, although reliable, is costly, subjective, and difficult to scale. Recent approaches using large language models as evaluators offer improved scalability but frequently lack explicit grounding in human-defined evaluation principles, leading to bias and inconsistency. In this paper, we introduce Quantifying Qualitative Judgment (QQJ), a scalable and human-centric evaluation framework that explicitly bridges the gap between human judgment and automated assessment. QQJ separates the definition of quality from its execution by anchoring evaluation in expert-designed, multi-dimensional rubrics and calibrating large language model evaluators to align with expert reasoning using a small, high-quality annotation set. This design enables consistent, interpretable, and scalable evaluation across diverse generative tasks and modalities. Extensive experiments on text and image generation demonstrate that QQJ achieves substantially stronger alignment with human judgment than traditional automatic metrics and unconstrained LLM-based evaluators. Moreover, QQJ exhibits improved stability across repeated evaluations and superior diagnostic capability in identifying critical failure modes such as hallucination and intent mismatch. These results indicate that structured qualitative judgment can be operationalized at scale without sacrificing interpretability or human alignment, positioning QQJ as a practical foundation for reliable evaluation of modern generative AI systems.

arXiv:2605.17382v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：生成式人工智能的快速发展暴露了现有评估方法的根本局限性，特别是对于开放式、创造性和面向人类的任务。传统的自动指标依赖于表面的统计相似性，通常无法反映人类对质量的感知，而纯粹的人类评估虽然可靠，但成本高昂、主观且难以扩展。最近使用大型语言模型作为评估器的方法提供了改进的可扩展性，但经常缺乏人类定义的评估原则的明确基础，导致偏差和不一致。在本文中，我们介绍了量化定性判断（QQJ），这是一种可扩展且以人为中心的评估框架，明确弥合了人类判断和自动评估之间的差距。 QQJ 通过将评估锚定在专家设计的多维量规中，并使用小型高质量注释集校准大型语言模型评估器以与专家推理保持一致，从而将质量的定义与其执行分开。这种设计能够跨不同的生成任务和模式进行一致、可解释和可扩展的评估。关于文本和图像生成的大量实验表明，与传统的自动指标和无约束的基于 LLM 的评估器相比，QQJ 与人类判断的一致性要强得多。此外，QQJ 在重复评估中表现出更高的稳定性，在识别幻觉和意图不匹配等关键故障模式方面表现出卓越的诊断能力。这些结果表明，结构化定性判断可以在不牺牲可解释性或人类对齐的情况下大规模实施，从而将 QQJ 定位为现代生成人工智能系统可靠评估的实用基础。

目标检测/分割
2026-05-19

Dynamic Elliptical Graph Factor Models via Riemannian Optimization with Geodesic Temporal Regularization

通过带有测地时间正则化的黎曼优化的动态椭圆图因子模型

Chuansen Peng、Xiaojing Shen

论文页面 PDF HTML 版本 暂无开源

arXiv:2605.18316v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Inferring time-varying graph structures from high-dimensional nodal observations is a fundamental problem arising in neuroscience, finance, climatology, and beyond. Two intrinsic challenges govern this problem: maintaining the \emph{temporal coherence} of the latent graph across successive observation windows, and respecting the \emph{intrinsic Riemannian geometry} of the symmetric positive definite manifold on which precision matrices naturally reside, a curved space whose geodesic structure departs fundamentally from that of the ambient Euclidean space. In this paper we propose dynamic estimation on the Grassmann manifold with a factor model (\textsc{Degfm}), a novel algorithm that jointly addresses both challenges. We model the time-varying precision matrix sequence as a low-rank-plus-diagonal structure governed by a latent elliptical graph factor model, which drastically reduces the effective parameter count and enables reliable estimation in the challenging small-sample regime. Temporal coherence is enforced through a Riemannian geodesic penalty defined on the Grassmann manifold, ensuring that the estimated graph trajectory is smooth with respect to the intrinsic geometry rather than the ambient Euclidean space. To solve the resulting non-convex optimization problem over Grassmann-manifold-valued sequences subject to the LRaD constraint, we derive an efficient Riemannian gradient descent algorithm that respects the manifold structure at every iterate and rigorously establish its convergence to a stationary point. Extensive experiments on both synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that \textsc{Degfm} consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across all evaluation metrics, confirming the practical effectiveness of the proposed framework.

arXiv:2605.18316v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：从高维节点观测中推断时变图结构是神经科学、金融、气候学等领域出现的一个基本问题。两个内在的挑战控制着这个问题：在连续的观察窗口中保持潜在图的\emph{时间相干性}，并尊重精密矩阵自然驻留在其上的对称正定流形的\emph{固有黎曼几何}，这是一个其测地线结构从根本上不同于周围欧几里得空间的弯曲空间。在本文中，我们提出了使用因子模型（\textsc{Degfm}）对格拉斯曼流形进行动态估计，这是一种共同解决这两个挑战的新颖算法。我们将时变精度矩阵序列建模为由潜在椭圆图因子模型控制的低秩加对角结构，这大大减少了有效参数计数，并能够在具有挑战性的小样本情况下进行可靠估计。时间相干性是通过在格拉斯曼流形上定义的黎曼测地线惩罚来强制执行的，确保估计的图轨迹相对于内在几何而不是环境欧几里得空间是平滑的。为了解决受 LRaD 约束的格拉斯曼流形值序列上产生的非凸优化问题，我们推导了一种有效的黎曼梯度下降算法，该算法在每次迭代时都考虑流形结构，并严格建立其收敛到驻点的能力。对综合基准和现实数据集的大量实验表明， \textsc{Degfm} 在所有评估指标上始终优于最先进的基线，证实了所提出框架的实际有效性。

没有找到匹配的论文
